summary: Sprint 4 full testing: Backend 33/33 tests passed. All Sprint 4 features verified: Netflix-style carousels (8 categories), search with filters, blueprint detail with paywall, DailyBlueprintWidget on home + discover. Metro cache was stale and was cleared during testing (stats now show correctly).

ui_bugs.issue: Metro bundle cache was stale - was showing '20+ Total Blueprints' and '4 Categories' instead of '99+ Blueprints' and '8 Categories'. FIXED by clearing metro cache and restarting expo server.

issues: Design looks clean and consistent with the dark fintech theme. Electric Mint #00D95F accents used properly. Good contrast on all text. Cards have proper padding and spacing. Paywall CTA is very prominent with bright green background.

Shows mostly AI & Automation blueprints because many AI blueprints have low startup_cost + medium difficulty criteria. May want to add category diversity to the Quick Wins query to show a broader mix.

action_items: LOW: Consider adding category diversity to Quick Wins carousel query to show more variety (currently shows mostly AI & Automation blueprints since they fit low-cost + medium difficulty criteria)

LOW: data-testid attributes on React Native Web TouchableOpacity elements are not accessible via standard DOM attribute selectors - this is an RN Web limitation. Consider using testID prop instead of data-testid for React Native Web compatibility if you need Playwright testing

LOW: Test user (TEST_sprint4_tester@blueprint.com) gets redirected to questionnaire on each login - verify questionnaire completion persistence is working correctly (AsyncStorage may clear on page reload)
critical_code_review_comments: ALREADY NOTED from iteration_2: Login/signup endpoints do not return is_architect field - should still be fixed
Route ordering in FastAPI is CORRECT: /blueprints/carousels, /blueprints/daily/{user_id}, /blueprints/search all come BEFORE the parameterized /blueprints/{id} route - verified working

MEDIUM: Quick Wins carousel query: startup_cost in [free, low] + difficulty in [easy, medium] returns mostly AI blueprints. Consider adding cross-category filtering or excluding categories already featured in other carousels
LOW: Metro cache needs periodic clearing in CI/deployment workflows to ensure fresh bundles. Consider adding cache-busting to deployment scripts

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all Sprint 4 UI features verified - only Metro cache issue which was fixed during testing)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_sprint4_tester@blueprint.com test account for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 4 fully tested and working. IMPORTANT: Metro cache had stale bundle - was cleared during testing (rm -rf /app/frontend/.metro-cache/cache && sudo supervisorctl restart expo). All Sprint 4 features verified: 8-carousel Discover tab, search+filter, blueprint-detail with paywall blur, DailyBlueprintWidget on home+discover. Backend route ordering fix is confirmed working (carousels/search/daily routes correctly take precedence over parameterized /blueprints/{id}). Test user: TEST_sprint4_tester@blueprint.com / TestPass123. Previous Sprint 1-3 features (streak, wins feed, AI guide, Stripe upgrade) appear visually present based on tab bar (Home/Discover/My Plans/Wins/Profile).
rca_of_the_issue: Metro bundle cache issue (same as Sprint 2): The Expo Metro bundler had stale cache from before Sprint 4. The home.tsx stats row was showing old values ('20+ Total Blueprints', '4 Categories') instead of Sprint 4 values ('99+ Blueprints', '8 Categories'). Fix applied: cleared /app/frontend/.metro-cache/cache and restarted expo supervisor. Note: This is a recurring issue - consider adding cache clearing to deployment workflow.
